result.summary: The Sahel region has become the global epicentre of terrorism, accounting for nearly half of all terror-related deaths in 2025, with ongoing rivalries between Al Qaeda and ISIS affiliates.
result.reasoning: The high frequency of conflicts and terrorist activities in the region indicate a medium risk level.

signals.text: The Sahel region accounted for nearly half of all terror-related deaths in 2025.

best.description: Improved regional cooperation and security measures lead to a decrease in terrorist activities.

likely.description: Ongoing rivalries between Al Qaeda and ISIS affiliates continue, with potential escalation.

worst.description: The region descends into chaos, with increased terrorist activities and instability.

civilian_impact.displacement: Significant displacement expected due to ongoing conflicts.

infrastructure.status: Institutional systems under pressure due to lack of state control.

sources.name: Global Terrorism Report
sources.title: Sahel region accounts for nearly half of all terror-related deaths.
